game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Slayin:** Players select one of six unique hero classes and control them in a single-screen arena by tapping the left side of the screen to move left or the right side to move right, with the hero automatically attacking enemies upon weapon collision. Enemies continuously spawn from the screen's edges at increasing rates and speeds, each with distinct movement patterns and health values, requiring precise positioning to defeat. Defeating enemies awards experience points for leveling up, which grants stat increases and new abilities, alongside coins used to purchase equipment upgrades like Sword +1 or Armor +2 from a periodically appearing shopkeeper. The game features endless progression where difficulty scales through escalating enemy density and the introduction of new monster types and boss encounters every few minutes. A run concludes instantly when the hero's health points reach zero, resulting in permanent death and the objective of achieving the highest score based on monsters slain and time survived.
game_info.description: Welcome to Slayin' Arena! Choose your hero and survive waves of monsters in an endless single-screen battle. Your hero automatically attacks enemies when in range, while you control their movement left and right. Defeat monsters to gain experience, level up, and earn coins. A traveling merchant appears periodically, offering equipment upgrades to boost your stats. Survive as long as possible and slay as many monsters as you can before your health reaches zero!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / Left: Move hero left
Arrow Right / Right: Move hero right
Space: Select hero class (on start screen only)
ENTER: Start game after selecting hero
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat test. Validates that the hero can move left and right, attack enemies automatically, take damage, and that the game responds correctly to basic gameplay mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the hero in a pattern that encounters enemies. Allow automatic attacks to trigger. Test basic collision detection and damage systems by engaging with spawned enemies.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully demonstrates movement controls work, enemies spawn and can be defeated, the hero takes damage when hit, and score/experience systems function correctly.

TEST_1.expected: The test successfully demonstrates movement controls work, enemies spawn and can be defeated, the hero takes damage when hit, and score/experience systems function correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal survival and win strategy test. This implements advanced positioning strategies to maximize survival time, efficient enemy elimination, and proper use of merchant upgrades to reach high levels.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Maintain optimal positioning in the center-left area to control enemy approach angles. Prioritize weaker enemies first, kite stronger ones, and purchase health and damage upgrades from merchants. Use strategic retreats to avoid being overwhelmed.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The hero survives for an extended period (200+ seconds), reaches level 10+, defeats 50+ enemies, and successfully purchases multiple upgrades, demonstrating mastery of game mechanics.

TEST_3.test_description: Merchant interaction test. Validates that the merchant spawning system works, the shop interface functions correctly, and upgrades are properly applied to hero stats.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Survive until merchant spawns. Collect enough coins through enemy kills. Move to merchant location and interact with shop. Purchase available upgrades and verify stat increases.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Merchant appears at expected intervals, shop interface displays correctly, coins are deducted properly, and purchased upgrades increase hero stats (health, damage, or armor).
